task_completion.visual_evidence: The Avare app interface is visible, typically showing an aviation map, a startup screen, or the main app dashboard.

task_completion.description: Access the main menu of the Avare app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main navigation menu or options panel of the Avare app is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Open the Preferences or Settings menu
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen titled 'Preferences', 'Settings', or similar is visible, showing a list of configurable app options or categories.

task_completion.description: Locate the 'Auto Show Airport Diagram' setting
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Auto Show Airport Diagram' (or a very similar variation) is visible within the settings list.

task_completion.description: Enable the 'Auto Show Airport Diagram' setting
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox, toggle switch, or radio button next to the 'Auto Show Airport Diagram' setting is checked, highlighted, or in the 'on' position.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to change the setting
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard Android UI interactions (tapping menus, toggling switches) rather than a terminal emulator or command-line interface.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Avare application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a genuine aviation navigation app (Avare) and not a generic mock app or a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not directly edit the preferences XML file
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of a text editor or file manager being used to open and modify the 'com.ds.avare_preferences.xml' file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task targets the Avare Aviation GPS app (package: com.ds.avare). The goal is to enable the 'Auto Show Airport Diagram' setting, which corresponds to the 'AutoShowAirportDiagram' boolean preference. The VLM must verify that this specific setting is toggled to the 'on' or 'checked' state (representing a 'true' value) in the app's graphical settings menu. Direct editing of the XML preference file at /data/data/com.ds.avare/shared_prefs/com.ds.avare_preferences.xml via a text editor is considered a failed integrity check.
